title: Full Stack Web Development
tagline: Build, deploy and ship full-stack products from scratch
description: The most complete full-stack program in India — from HTML to deploying scalable microservices on AWS. You will build 10+ real products, get weekly code reviews from senior engineers, and get placed at top startups.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Build and deploy full-stack apps with React, Next.js, Node.js and PostgreSQL
Design RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints used in production
Implement authentication, payments, real-time features and file uploads
Write clean, tested, type-safe code with TypeScript and Jest
Deploy on AWS with Docker, CI/CD pipelines and monitoring
Crack technical interviews with system design + DSA preparation

projects.desc: Full-stack store with payments, auth and admin dashboard

projects.desc: WebSocket-powered chat with rooms and notifications

projects.name: SaaS Dashboard
projects.desc: Multi-tenant app with role-based access and analytics

projects.name: Job Board
projects.desc: Full-featured job listing platform with search and filters

title: AI Agents & Automation
tagline: Build intelligent products with LLMs, agents and automation workflows
description: Master LLMs, AI agents and automation to build products that 99% of developers can't. This program covers everything from OpenAI APIs to deploying production-grade AI tools with real users.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Integrate LLMs like GPT-4, Claude and Gemini into production apps
Build autonomous AI agents with tool-calling and memory
Create RAG pipelines with vector databases for semantic search
Automate complex workflows with LangChain and CrewAI
Ship AI-powered SaaS with subscriptions and user management
Deploy and monitor AI systems with cost and latency optimisation

title: Frontend Engineering — React & Next.js
tagline: Become the frontend engineer every product team wants to hire
description: Go deep on React, Next.js, TypeScript, animations and design systems. Ship 5 pixel-perfect production apps that make interviewers stop and take notice.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Master React from fundamentals to advanced patterns like compound components
Build full applications with Next.js App Router, RSC and server actions
Write type-safe code with TypeScript and handle complex form logic
Create stunning animations with Framer Motion and CSS
Test your components with Jest, React Testing Library and Playwright
Build and consume design systems with Storybook and Radix UI

title: Backend Engineering — Node.js & APIs
tagline: Build the APIs and systems that power modern products
description: Master Node.js, databases, security and system scalability. Build APIs used by thousands of users — with proper auth, caching, queues and observability.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Build scalable REST APIs with Node.js, Express and Fastify
Design and optimise SQL schemas with PostgreSQL
Implement JWT, OAuth2 and session-based authentication
Cache data with Redis and handle background jobs with queues
Write unit and integration tests with Jest and Supertest
Deploy APIs on AWS with load balancers, autoscaling and monitoring

title: System Design & DSA Masterclass
tagline: Crack senior engineer interviews at top product companies
description: The most focused interview prep program for engineers targeting senior roles at Swiggy, Razorpay, PhonePe and similar companies. Covers HLD, LLD, and 300+ DSA problems.
whatYouLearn: Design systems like URL shorteners, Instagram, WhatsApp and Uber
Master data structures: arrays, trees, graphs, heaps and tries
Solve 300+ LeetCode-style problems with time/space complexity analysis
Understand CAP theorem, consistency models and distributed systems
Design low-level class hierarchies with SOLID principles
Perform confidently in whiteboard and live coding interviews

title: DevOps, Cloud & CI/CD
tagline: Automate everything. Deploy with confidence. Scale on demand.
description: From zero to DevOps engineer — learn Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform and GitHub Actions to build and run production infrastructure like the best engineering teams do.

meta.text: Min. work exp: Open to all

whatYouLearn: Containerise applications with Docker and Docker Compose
Orchestrate services with Kubernetes — deployments, services, ingress
Provision cloud infrastructure on AWS with Terraform
Build CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and ArgoCD
Monitor systems with Prometheus, Grafana and CloudWatch
Implement GitOps practices and zero-downtime deployments

title: On-Campus Full Stack Bootcamp
tagline: 6 months residential — from zero to job-ready in Bangalore
description: The most immersive coding experience in India — 6 months residential in Bangalore, living and building alongside 50 other engineers. Daily standups, weekly demos and direct placement support.
whatYouLearn: Complete full-stack curriculum from HTML to cloud deployment
Daily pair-programming and live code review from senior mentors
Work in product squads shipping features every Friday
Attend weekly guest talks from founders and CTOs
Interview prep with 20+ mock rounds and whiteboard sessions
Graduate with a portfolio of 12+ production-quality projects
